item.title: 奥尔特曼告知员工：OpenAI对五角大楼决策无发言权
item.description: OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥尔特曼向员工表示，公司无权决定国防部如何使用其人工智能软件，并暗示这种干预意愿可能是五角大楼与竞争对手Anthropic PBC之间紧张关系的部分原因。【原文：OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman told employees that the company doesn’t get to make the call about what the Defense Department does with its artificial intelligence software and suggested the desire to do so may have been part of tensions between the Pentagon and rival Anthropic PBC.】

item.title: 韩国股市指数因伊朗战争抛售潮面临回调压力
item.description: 韩国股市基准指数正步入调整阶段，中东冲突引发的避险情绪导致全球最火爆的股市之一遭遇大幅抛售。【原文：South Korea’s equity benchmark is on track to enter a correction, as risk-off sentiment spurred by the Middle East conflict drives a steep selloff in one of the world’s hottest stock markets.】

item.title: 英伟达领投1.03亿美元融资，支持英国另一无人驾驶初创企业
item.description: 英伟达公司正向英国自动驾驶初创企业Oxa注资，这家英国企业成为最新获得全球市值最高公司支持的自动驾驶初创企业。【原文：Nvidia Corp. is investing in Oxa, the latest British autonomous driving startup to receive backing from the world’s most valuable company.】

item.title: 纽约出租车保险公司未在事故案件中为优步辩护，法官表示
item.description: 美国一名法官支持优步科技公司的申诉，认定纽约市最大的出租车保险公司美国运输保险公司未能在涉及优步司机的交通事故案件中为该网约车公司提供辩护。【原文：A US judge sided with Uber Technologies Inc. in its complaint that American Transit Insurance Co., the largest taxi insurer in New York City, failed to defend the ride-hailing company in crash cases involving its drivers.】

item.title: 网球频道加入亚马逊，作为更广泛流媒体战略的一部分
item.description: 网球频道正计划在在线电视市场展开更大规模的布局。【原文：The Tennis Channel is looking to take a bigger swing at the online TV market.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发的石油冲击恐将掀起全球通胀浪潮
item.description:
持续高企的油价将推高通胀并拖累经济增长，使各国央行陷入两难境地。

【原文：

Sustained high oil prices would boost inflation and slow growth, putting central banks in a tough spot.

】

item.title: 金价上涨，交易员权衡中东风险与美元走强
item.description: 金价在前一交易日暴跌逾4%后反弹，因交易员权衡美元走强与中东战事升级引发的避险资产需求。【原文：Gold rose, after tumbling more than 4% in the previous session, as traders weighed a stronger dollar against demand for safer assets as war escalates in the Middle East.】

item.title: 安普瑞克营收年化率逼近200亿美元，五角大楼内部争执持续
item.description: 基于当前业绩预测，Anthropic PBC有望实现近200亿美元的年收入，较去年末的运行率翻倍有余——这标志着这家人工智能公司在近期与五角大楼发生冲突前正处于快速增长阶段。【原文：Anthropic PBC is on track to generate annual revenue of almost $20 billion, a projection based on current performance, more than doubling its run rate from late last year — a sign of the AI company’s rapid growth in the lead-up to its recent clash with the Pentagon.】

item.title: 油价延续涨势，交易员权衡美国为霍尔木兹海峡制定护航计划
item.description: 油价延续涨势，因中东地区再度爆发袭击事件，且交易员正评估美国一项为通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮提供保险和护航的计划——这条重要水道的航运活动几乎完全停滞。【原文：Oil extended gains as fresh attacks flared in the Middle East and traders weighed a US plan to insure and escort tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz, with traffic in the vital waterway all but halted.】

item.title: 中国廉价资金正撼动9.5万亿美元全球贷款市场
item.description: 中国银行凭借充裕的低成本资金，正在重塑全球贷款市场的部分格局，凸显出这个世界第二大经济体的通缩压力正日益影响着其与国际贷款机构的竞争态势。【原文：Chinese banks, flush with low-cost funds, are reshaping parts of the global loan market, underscoring how deflationary pressures in the world’s second-largest economy are increasingly influencing competition with international lenders.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发的石油冲击加剧印度股市风险
item.description: 策略师表示，随着中东局势紧张加剧推高油价并冲击进口企业，印度股市可能进一步扩大相对于全球同行的表现差距。【原文：Beaten-up Indian equities are likely to widen their underperformance against global peers, as escalating tensions in the Middle East push oil prices higher and hurt importers, strategists say.】

item.title: 预测市场热潮迎来新挑战者，其根源在亚洲
item.description: 去年末，一家鲜为人知的、源自亚洲的预测市场平台横空出世，但其迅猛的开局势头似乎已开始减弱。【原文：A little-known prediction market platform with Asia roots burst onto the scene late last year, but already its fast start appears to be running out of steam.】

item.title: 中国领导人商讨经济路线图时需关注哪些要点
item.description: 中国领导层本周在国际危机阴影下召开会议，为2030年经济增长蓝图做最后完善，并公布了隔绝经济受全球动荡影响的计划。【原文：China’s leadership is meeting in the shadow of crises abroad this week, as it puts the finishing touches on its blueprint for growth through 2030 and unveils plans to insulate the economy from global turmoil.】

item.title: 亚洲股市料将下挫，因油价延续涨势：市场综述
item.description: 亚洲股市料将跟随华尔街走低，此前尾盘反弹削弱了更广泛的抛售潮，因美国保证确保霍尔木兹海峡航运安全，这有助于稳定市场情绪。油价也回吐了早盘涨幅——尽管仍创下四年来的最大两日涨幅——而黄金价格则大幅下跌。【原文：Asian stocks are poised to track Wall Street lower after a late rebound trimmed a broader selloff, as US assurances on securing shipping through the Strait of Hormuz helped steady nerves. Oil also pared earlier advances — though still notched its biggest two-day gain in four years — while gold slumped.】

item.title: 华尔街策略师警告：勿押注特朗普能挽救受伊朗战争冲击的股市
item.description: 周二美国股市开始收复部分最大跌幅，这似乎表明交易员们再次押注特朗普总统将找到办法，控制住他引发的又一场危机所造成的冲击。【原文：As US stocks began paring back their deepest losses on Tuesday, it looked as if traders were again starting to bet that President Donald Trump would find a way to contain the fallout from another crisis he unleashed.】

item.title: 六张图表解读中国经济疲软态势
item.description: 中国惊人的经济增长——它提升了国内收入水平，重塑了海外市场格局——曾一度如同自然法则般不可阻挡。【原文：China’s breakneck economic growth – which lifted incomes at home and reshaped markets abroad – once seemed as inevitable as a law of nature.】

item.title: 黑石高管在旗舰私募信贷基金承压之际大举买入
item.description: 黑石集团的高管们面临一个抉择。【原文：Executives at Blackstone Inc. had a decision to make.】

item.title: 巴西放宽银行准备金规则，此前Banco Master事件引发连锁反应
item.description: 巴西央行对银行机构实施部分减免，以补充该国存款保险基金。该基金即将因Banco Master SA银行倒闭事件承受近100亿美元的损失。【原文：Brazil’s central bank granted lenders partial relief as they replenish the nation’s deposit insurance fund, which is poised to shoulder an almost $10 billion hit from the fallout of Banco Master SA.】

item.title: 罗斯销售增长预期超出预期，折扣商品赢得消费者青睐
item.description: 罗斯百货公司预测其新财年同店销售额增长将超出分析师预期，这家折扣零售商持续通过低价销售奢侈品来应对消费者购买力不足的困境。【原文：Ross Stores Inc. forecast same-store sales growth for its upcoming fiscal year that topped analyst estimates as the off-price retailer continues to capitalize on affordability woes by selling luxury items for less.】

item.title: 债券交易员削减降息押注，因战争加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 期货市场交易员正大幅下调对美联储降息的预期，因与伊朗的战争加剧了通胀卷土重来的担忧。【原文：Traders in the futures markets are sharply reducing expectations for interest rate cuts from the Federal Reserve, as the war with Iran drives fears of an inflationary resurgence.】

item.title: 卢拉之子因欺诈调查遭参议院解除银行保密令
item.description: 巴西总统路易斯·伊纳西奥·卢拉·达席尔瓦之子正面临国会委员会的严密审查，该委员会正在调查巴西国家养老金体系涉嫌欺诈的行为，这给这位左翼领导人即将到来的连任之战蒙上阴影。【原文：President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s son is facing mounting scrutiny from a congressional committee probing alleged fraud in Brazil’s national pension system, posing risk to the leftist leader ahead of a looming reelection fight.】

item.title: 默茨称欧盟不会接受关税条件更差的美国贸易协议
item.description: 德国总理弗里德里希·梅尔茨向唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，他希望欧盟与美国的贸易协定能尽快实施，但欧盟不能接受条件更差的协议。【原文：German Chancellor Friedrich Merz told President Donald Trump that he wants the European Union’s trade agreement with the US to be implemented quickly but the bloc can’t accept a deal with worse conditions.】

item.title: CrowdStrike发布销售展望，符合华尔街预期
item.description: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc.公布的季度销售额基本符合分析师预期，这表明在人工智能加剧网络安全威胁担忧的时代，市场需求依然稳定。【原文：CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. projected quarterly sales that were roughly in line with analysts’ estimates, signaling steady demand in an era when artificial intelligence has heightened concerns over cybersecurity threats.】

item.title: 英特尔任命巴拉特为下一任董事长，接替弗兰克·耶里
item.description: 英特尔公司任命克雷格·巴拉特为下一任董事长，在该公司试图重振其芯片制造实力之际，将一位科技界资深人士推上了这一职位。【原文：Intel Corp. named Craig H. Barratt as its next chairman, putting a tech veteran in the role at a time when the company is trying to reassert its chipmaking prowess.】

item.title: 韩国央行新行长将掌舵增长不均衡时代
item.description: 韩国可能即将任命新的央行行长，而此时货币政策的方向并不像表面看起来那样稳定。【原文：South Korea may be about to appoint a new central bank chief, at a time when the direction of monetary policy isn’t as stable as it might appear.】

item.title: 塔吉特新任首席执行官公布全面改革计划，从美妆到婴幼儿用品全面升级
item.description: 塔吉特公司新任首席执行官正为华尔街树立宏伟目标，并承诺将通过推出时尚新食品、店内美容服务及其他变革举措，推动公司重回增长轨道。【原文：Target Corp.’s new chief executive officer is setting big expectations for Wall Street and pledging a return to growth powered by trendy new food products, in-store beauty services and other changes.】

item.title: Nettimi称，人工智能机器人大军将为对冲基金注入强劲动力
item.description: 对冲基金创始人迪维亚·内蒂米表示，未来三到五年内，对冲基金可能拥有由人工智能机器人组成的庞大团队，协助其研究并交易数百只股票。【原文：In just three to five years, hedge funds could have fleets of artificial intelligence bots helping them research and trade hundreds of stocks, according to hedge fund founder Divya Nettimi.】

item.title: 据称埃隆·马斯克的SpaceX公司将花旗集团纳入首次公开募股（IPO）承销银行阵容
item.description: 知情人士透露，随着亿万富翁埃隆·马斯克旗下的火箭与卫星公司SpaceX距离轰动性上市日益临近，花旗集团已加入其首次公开募股的牵头银行行列。【原文：SpaceX has added Citigroup Inc. to the banks leading its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as billionaire Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company moves closer to a blockbuster debut.】

item.title: 乌拉圭因通胀率持续低迷第七次下调基准利率
item.description: 乌拉圭央行延长了宽松周期，将基准利率下调0.75个百分点至5.75%，以应对低于目标的通胀水平。【原文：Uruguay’s central bank extended its easing cycle, lowering the benchmark interest rate by three quarters of a percentage point to 5.75% as it grapples with inflation below its target.】

item.title: 布鲁克菲尔德称伊朗战争不会影响其200亿美元卡塔尔交易
item.description: 布鲁克菲尔德资产管理公司首席执行官康纳·特斯基表示，美国对伊朗的战争并未改变该公司与卡塔尔投资局合作建设数据中心的计划，也未抑制其在中东地区的投资意愿。【原文：The US war in Iran hasn’t changed Brookfield Asset Management’s plans to build data centers with the Qatar Investment Authority or curbed its appetite for investing in the Middle East, Chief Executive Officer Connor Teskey said.】
